1.translation: AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq bgĂ„Â§atna lil Noc gĂ„Â§and niesu (u gĂ„Â§ednielu): sWissi lil niesek qabel ma jigihom kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§i

2.translation: (Qalilhom lil niesu): 7Ja niesi, tabilĂ„Â§aqq li. jiena, gĂ„Â§alikom, wieĂ„Â§ed li jwissi bic-car

3.translation: (ufngĂ„Â§idilkom): Qimu lil Alla u ibzgĂ„Â§u minnu, u obduni

4.translation: (biex b'hekk) jaĂ„Â§frilkom dnubietkom u jĂ„Â§allikom (sgawdu fil-Ă„Â§ajja) sa zmien imsemmi. Tassew li z-zmien ta' Alla, meta jasal, ma jitĂ„Â§alliex gĂ„Â§al darb'oĂ„Â§ra, li kieku kontu taful

5.translation: Qal (Noc): 'Sidi, jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq sejjaĂ„Â§t lil niesi (lejn triq is-sewwa), lejl u nhar

6.translation: izda s-sejĂ„Â§a tiegĂ„Â§i ma zidithomx Ă„Â§lief fil-Ă„Â§arba (mir- twemmin u c-caĂ„Â§da tiegĂ„Â§u)

7.translation: Kull darba li jiena nsejĂ„Â§ilhom (/ejn it-twemmin veru), biex Inti taĂ„Â§frilhom, (arahom) iqiegĂ„Â§du s-swaba' tagĂ„Â§hom f'widnejhom, jitgĂ„Â§attew bi Ibieshom. (biex ma jarawnix u lanqas jisimgĂ„Â§uni), iwebbsu rashom, u jitkabbru wisq

8.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq sejjaĂ„Â§tilhom bla Ă„Â§abi

9.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq Ă„Â§abbartilhom (il-bxara tiegĂ„Â§ek) bil-miftuĂ„Â§ u bil-moĂ„Â§bi

10.translation: (u gĂ„Â§edtfilhom): 'ltolbu maĂ„Â§fra mingĂ„Â§and Sidkomt Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq dejjem jaĂ„Â§fer

11.translation: (Jekk tilqgĂ„Â§u kliemi u temmnu f'Alla) Huwa. jibgĂ„Â§at fuqkom is-sema (bix-xita fejjieda), kotrana

12.translation: jagĂ„Â§tikom gid u wlied, jagĂ„Â§mlilkom gonna, u jagĂ„Â§mlilkom xmajjar (biex tithennew bihom)

13.translation: U gĂ„Â§aliex ma tixtiqux tagĂ„Â§tu gieĂ„Â§ lil Alla

14.translation: meta Ă„Â§alaqkom f'(bosta) stadji (u l-ewwel kontu nitfa ta' sperma, imbagĂ„Â§ad sirtu demm magĂ„Â§qud. li mal-Ă„Â§in sar bicca laĂ„Â§am, u mbagĂ„Â§ad sirtu gĂ„Â§adam miksi bil-laĂ„Â§am, u Ă„Â§adtu l-gĂ„Â§amla ta' bnedmin)

15.translation: Mela ma tarawx kif Alla Ă„Â§alaq seba' smewwiet fuq xulxin

16.translation: ufihom gĂ„Â§amel il-qamar dawl, u gĂ„Â§amel ix-xemx musbieĂ„Â§

18.translation: imbagĂ„Â§ad ireggagĂ„Â§kom fiha (wara mewrkom), u zgur joĂ„Â§rogkom (minnha f'Jum il-Qawmien)

19.translation: U Alla gĂ„Â§amlilkom l-art mifruxa bĂ„Â§al tapit

21.translation: Qal Noc: ''Sidi, huma tabilĂ„Â§aqq m'obdewnix, u mxew wara dak (minn fost il-kbarat u l-gĂ„Â§onja tagĂ„Â§hom) li gidu u wliedu ma ziduhx Ă„Â§lief fit-telfien

22.translation: U (il-kbarat u l-gĂ„Â§onja) nassu tnassis kbir

23.translation: uqalu (lif xulxin): 'La tĂ„Â§allux lill-allat tagĂ„Â§kom, u la tĂ„Â§allux la lil (l-alla) Wadd, la lil (l-alla) SuwagĂ„Â§, u lanqas lil (l- allat) JagĂ„Â§at, JagĂ„Â§iq u Nasri

24.translation: U lil Ă„Â§afna tellfuhom it-triq. Lill-Ă„Â§ziena (Sidi l-Mulej) izzidhomx jekk mhux fit-telfient' (U A/la sema' s-sejĂ„Â§a ta' Noc u gĂ„Â§errighom fid-dilluvju)

25.translation: MinĂ„Â§abba Ă„Â§tijiethom kienu mgĂ„Â§arrqa, u ddaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§lu f'Nar (l- Infern). Huma ma sabux lil min jgĂ„Â§inhom, flok Alla

26.translation: U qal Noc: ''Sidi, la tĂ„Â§alli lil-Ă„Â§add fuq l-art minn dawk li ina jemmnux

27.translation: Jekk. Inti tĂ„Â§allihom, huma jtellfu t-triq lill-qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§ek, u ma jwelldux jekk mhux (i/a/): Ă„Â§ziena lima jemmnux

28.translation: Sidi, aĂ„Â§fer lili, lil missieri u lil ommi, lil-min jidĂ„Â§ol f'dari bi twemmin, u lil-dawk l-irgiel u lin-nisa li jemmnu. U lill- Ă„Â§ziena zzidhomx jekk mhux fil-qerda (u t-telfien, sew f'din id-dinja u sew fl-OĂ„Â§ra)

1.translation: GĂ„Â§id (lil niesek, MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''TnebbaĂ„Â§t li gemgĂ„Â§a ta' ginn semgĂ„Â§ufni naqra xi versi mill-Qoran) u qalu: 'AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq smajna Qoran ta' l-gĂ„Â§ageb

2.translation: lijmexxi (lif min jisimgĂ„Â§u) lejn it-triq it-tajba, u gĂ„Â§alhekk emminna fih. M'aĂ„Â§na se nxierku lil Ă„Â§add ma' Sidna

3.translation: U tabilĂ„Â§aqq (nemmnu wkoll) li Huwa intrefa' fl-gĂ„Â§oli s- sebĂ„Â§ ta' Sidna ma Ă„Â§ax gĂ„Â§alih sieĂ„Â§ba u lanqas wild

4.translation: U li l-iblah tagĂ„Â§na (/i gĂ„Â§andna fostna) kien jaqla' gideb kbir fuq Alla

5.translation: AĂ„Â§na (il-gemgĂ„Â§a tal-ginn) naĂ„Â§sbu li l-bnedmin u l-ginu ma humiex se jaqilgĂ„Â§u gideb fuq Alla

6.translation: U xi rgiel mill-bnedmin kienu tabilĂ„Â§aqq jitolbu l-Ă„Â§arsien ta' rgiel mill-ginn, u gĂ„Â§alhekk (/i/l-ginn) ziduhom fil-Ă„Â§azen

7.translation: u (dawk il-bnedmin li caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin) Ă„Â§asbu bĂ„Â§alma Ă„Â§sibtu (intom il-ginn)i li Alla ma huwa se jqajjem lil Ă„Â§add mill-mewt

8.translation: AĂ„Â§na gĂ„Â§arrixna s-sema (biex nisimgĂ„Â§u x'jingĂ„Â§ad fih) u sibnieh mimli. b'(angli) gĂ„Â§assiesa, qliel, b'ilsna. tan-nar (imĂ„Â§ejjija gĂ„Â§al min joqrob izzejjed)

9.translation: AĂ„Â§na konna noqogĂ„Â§du. f'qagĂ„Â§diet fih (is-sema) biex nisimgĂ„Â§u (xi jkun qiegĂ„Â§ed jingĂ„Â§ad), izda issa min jissemma' jsib ilsien tan-nar gĂ„Â§assa gĂ„Â§alih

10.translation: AĂ„Â§na ma nafux jekk dawk li jinsabu fl-art kienx maĂ„Â§sub gĂ„Â§alihom il-Ă„Â§azen, jew inkella Sidhom ridilhomx it-triq it- tajba

11.translation: U hemm minna li huma gusti, u minna li huma inqas minn hekk. AĂ„Â§na ninsabu f'bosta toroq

12.translation: AĂ„Â§na naĂ„Â§sbu li m'aĂ„Â§niex. se nfixklu lil-Alla fl-art, u m'aĂ„Â§niex se nfixkluh billi naĂ„Â§arbu (mill-kastig)

13.translation: U meta smajna t-tmexxija t-tajba (il-Qoran) emminna fiha, gĂ„Â§aliex min jemmen f'Sidu, la jibza' minn telfien. tal-Ă„Â§las tiegĂ„Â§u) u lanqas minn ingustizzja (gĂ„Â§aliex ma jizdidulux Ă„Â§tijiet li ma gĂ„Â§amilx)

14.translation: Hemm minna Misilmin, u hemm minna li huma ingusti. U min daĂ„Â§al fl-Islam, dawk huma li gĂ„Â§azlu t-triq it-tajba

15.translation: Imma l-ingusti, dawk ikunu l-Ă„Â§atab ta' l-Infern

16.translation: U kieku qabdu t-triq id-dritta. (tal-ligi ta' Alla), konna nisquhom ilma kotran

17.translation: biex ingarrbuhom bih. U min ma jagĂ„Â§tix widen gĂ„Â§at-tifkira ta' Sidu, (A//a) idaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§lu f'kastig mill-agĂ„Â§ar

18.translation: (MuĂ„Â§ammad qal: 'Jiena tnebbaĂ„Â§t) li l-moskej huma ta' Alla. Mela la ssejĂ„Â§u lil Ă„Â§add ma' Allal

19.translation: U (tnebbaĂ„Â§t ukoll) li meta l-qaddej ta' Alla qam biex isejjaĂ„Â§lu (lil Sidu l-Mulej, il-gemgĂ„Â§ar. tal-ginn). kienu gĂ„Â§oddhom. gejjin jagĂ„Â§fsu fuqu (fil-Ă„Â§egga' tagĂ„Â§hom. biex jisimgĂ„Â§u l-Qoran)

20.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Jiena nsejjaĂ„Â§ biss lil Sidi u ma nxierek lil-Ă„Â§add miegĂ„Â§u

21.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''TabilĂ„Â§aqq li jiena ma gĂ„Â§andix f'idejja s-setgĂ„Â§a (biex nagĂ„Â§mlilkom). il-Ă„Â§sara (jew biex ingibilkom) it-tmexxija t-tajba

22.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''TabilĂ„Â§aqq li lili Ă„Â§add ma jĂ„Â§arisni minn Alla, u m'iniex se nsib kenn barra minnu

23.translation: (Xejn ma jsalvani) Ă„Â§liet li nwassal (ir-Rivelazzjoni) minn Alla u l-messaggi tiegĂ„Â§u. U min ma joqgĂ„Â§odx gĂ„Â§al Alla u gĂ„Â§all-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, tabilĂ„Â§aqq ikollu Nar l-Infern u (hu u miin hu bĂ„Â§alu) fih jibqgĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§al dejjem

24.translation: (Dawk ta' bla twemmin jibqgĂ„Â§u jiddubitaw) sa. (il-Jum) meta. jaraw dak li huma mwegĂ„Â§din (il-kastig). ImbagĂ„Â§ad se jkunu jafu min huwa l-aktar dgĂ„Â§ajjef fl-alleati, u min huwa l-inqas fl-gĂ„Â§add

25.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Jiena ma nafx jekk dak li intom imwegĂ„Â§din (il-kasrig) huwiex qrib, jew jekk Sidi tawwallux iz-zmien

26.translation: Huwa jaf il-mistur, u ma jgĂ„Â§arraf lil Ă„Â§add bil-mistur tiegĂ„Â§u

27.translation: Ă„Â§lief lil xi MibgĂ„Â§ut li gĂ„Â§azel. ImbagĂ„Â§ad jibgĂ„Â§at quddiemu u warajh gĂ„Â§assiesa (li jĂ„Â§arsuh mill-ginn)

28.translation: biex (Alla) ikun jaf li (il-MibgĂ„Â§uzin tiegĂ„Â§u) Ă„Â§abbru. l- messaggi ta' Sidhom. Huwa gĂ„Â§andu taĂ„Â§t idejh: kulma gĂ„Â§andhom, u jgĂ„Â§odd kollox

2.translation: gĂ„Â§addil-lejl fit-talb, Ă„Â§lief gĂ„Â§al ftit (Ă„Â§in ta' mistrieĂ„Â§)

4.translation: jew zid miegĂ„Â§u, u aqra l-Qoran bil-qjiest

5.translation: AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq se nnizzlu fuqek ( MuĂ„Â§ammad) kliem tqil

6.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-qawmien billejl huwa aktar iebes (gĂ„Â§al snin jitlob, izda jsaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§u fil-fidi) u aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§all-fehma tal-kliem (li jingĂ„Â§ad fit-talb)

7.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li binhar gĂ„Â§andek taĂ„Â§bit kbir (u mattlu taĂ„Â§dem u taqdi dmirijietek)

8.translation: Ftakar (u semmi) Isem Sidek (lejl u nhar) u ngĂ„Â§ata lilu gĂ„Â§al kollox

9.translation: (Sid il-Lvant u l-Punent, ma hemmx Alla Ă„Â§lieful Mela lilu Ă„Â§u biex jieĂ„Â§u Ă„Â§siebfek)l

10.translation: Stabar (MuĂ„Â§ammad) b'dak li jgĂ„Â§idu (meta jqisuk saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar, Poeta, jew mignun) u itlaqhom bil-Ă„Â§lewwa (bla ma thumhom)

11.translation: U Ă„Â§allini nieĂ„Â§u Ă„Â§sieb dawk il-giddibin li gĂ„Â§andhom il-gid (biex nitĂ„Â§allas minnhom) u agĂ„Â§tihom ftit taz-zmien (ieĂ„Â§or ta' tgawdija sa ma jieĂ„Â§du l-kastig li Ă„Â§aqghom)

12.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li gĂ„Â§andna (imĂ„Â§ejji gĂ„Â§all-Ă„Â§ziena) xkiel: (biex norbtuhom bih) u Nar iĂ„Â§eggeg

13.translation: uikel (mill-agĂ„Â§ar) li jxerraq u joĂ„Â§noq, u kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

14.translation: fil-Jum meta l-art u l-igbla jithezzu, u l-igbla jsiru gĂ„Â§oljiet ta' ramel imxerred

15.translation: AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq bgĂ„Â§atnielkom MibgĂ„Â§ut li jixhed gĂ„Â§alikom, bĂ„Â§alma bgĂ„Â§atna MibgĂ„Â§ut lill-FargĂ„Â§un

16.translation: Izda l-FargĂ„Â§un ma qagĂ„Â§adx gĂ„Â§all-MibgĂ„Â§ut, u gĂ„Â§alhekk Ă„Â§adnieh (u kkastigajnieh) bil-qilla

17.translation: Kif; jekk ma temmnux, se tĂ„Â§arsu lilkom infuskom minn Jum li (fil-kruha tiegĂ„Â§u) ibajjad xagĂ„Â§ar it-tfal (gĂ„Â§aliex jixjieĂ„Â§u qabel zmienhom bil-biza)

18.translation: Is-sema jkun maqsum bih (bil-biza' ta' dak il-Jum): Il- wegĂ„Â§da tiegĂ„Â§u sseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§l

19.translation: Din tabilĂ„Â§aqq tifkira (ie twissija), u min irid, isib triq lejn Sidu

20.translation: Sidek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) tabilĂ„Â§aqq jaf li inti tqum (gĂ„Â§at-talb u l- qima tiegĂ„Â§u: xi drabi) inqas minn zewg terzi tal-lejl u fdrabi oĂ„Â§ra) nofsu, u (xi kultant) terz minnu, flimkien ma' gemgĂ„Â§a minn dawk ta' miegĂ„Â§ek. Alla jkejjel il-lejl u n-nhar, Huwa jaf li ma' tistgĂ„Â§ux titolbu l-lejl kollu, jew parti kbira minnu, u gĂ„Â§alhekk dar lejkom bil-maĂ„Â§fra. Mela aqraw kemm tistgĂ„Â§u mill-Qorant Huwa jaf li se jkun hemm minnkom morda, oĂ„Â§rajn iterrqu fl-art, ifittxu t-tjieba ta' Alla, u oĂ„Â§rajn jitqabdu gĂ„Â§al Alla. Mela aqraw dak li tistgĂ„Â§u minnuf U agĂ„Â§mlu t-talb, agĂ„Â§tu l-karita, u sellfu lil Alla self tajjeb (Dilli tgĂ„Â§inu lill-foqra u tagĂ„Â§mlu gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba)t Kull gid li tressqu quddiemkom gĂ„Â§al ruĂ„Â§kom, issibuh gĂ„Â§and Alla (dar il-premju) hu aĂ„Â§jar u akbar fil-Ă„Â§las (mill-gid li tkunu gĂ„Â§amiltu fid-dinja). U itolbu l-maĂ„Â§fra ta' Allal Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra, Ă„Â¦anin

6.translation: ula toqgĂ„Â§odx tiftaĂ„Â§ar bil-gid li tagĂ„Â§mel u tqisu kotran

8.translation: U meta tindaqq it-trumbetta (li zuri li wasal Jum il- Qawmien)

10.translation: mahuwiex Ă„Â§afif gĂ„Â§al dawk li caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin

11.translation: Ă„Â¦allini (MuĂ„Â§ammad) nieĂ„Â§u Ă„Â§sieb lil min Ă„Â§laqt waĂ„Â§du (f'gi/ ommu, li gie b'xejn fid-dinja, jigifieri. 'al-Walid ibn. al- MugĂ„Â§iira, wieĂ„Â§ed mill-kbarat ta' Quraj)

13.translation: u (gĂ„Â§axar) ulied li kienu xhieda miegĂ„Â§u

14.translation: uĂ„Â§sibtlu gĂ„Â§al kollox (hekk li ma kien jonqsu xejn)

16.translation: Lel Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq kien iwebbes rasu gĂ„Â§as-sinjali tagĂ„Â§nal

18.translation: Huwa tassew Ă„Â§aseb (us fehem x 'inhu l-Qoran) u ppjana (il-qerq)

19.translation: Meqrud huwat Ara kif ippjana (il-qerq uqal li l-Qoran seĂ„Â§er)

20.translation: U gĂ„Â§al-darba oĂ„Â§ra, meqrud kif ippjana (dak il-gideb kollu)l

24.translation: Huwa qal: 'Dan (il-Qoran) ma huwiex Ă„Â§lief seĂ„Â§er, meĂ„Â§ud minn ta' qabel

25.translation: dan ma huwiex Ă„Â§lief kliem il-bniedemt

28.translation: Lajjzomm xejn (minn dak li jidĂ„Â§ol fih, gĂ„Â§aliex jeqirdu) u lanqas iĂ„Â§alli (lil ebda Ă„Â§ati mingĂ„Â§ajr ma jaĂ„Â§arqu)

29.translation: ixejjer lill-bnedmin (mill-bogĂ„Â§od u jarawh gĂ„Â§aliex kbir wisq)

30.translation: Fuqu (l-Infern) hemm dsatax(-i/ gĂ„Â§assies ta' qilla kbira)

31.translation: MaĂ„Â§tarniex gĂ„Â§assiesa tan-Nar jekk mhux angli u ma gĂ„Â§amilniex l-gĂ„Â§add (zgĂ„Â§ir) tagĂ„Â§hom gĂ„Â§ajr biex ingarrbu lil dawk li ma jemmnux (gĂ„Â§aliex jaĂ„Â§sbu li jistgĂ„Â§u jegĂ„Â§lbuhom), biex dawk li ngĂ„Â§ataw il-Ktieb. ikunu jafu fiz-zgur (i MuĂ„Â§ammad huwa. l- MibgĂ„Â§ut, u li l-Qoran nizel mingĂ„Â§and Alla), u biex. dawk li jemmnu jizdiedu fit-twemmin, u biex dawk li ngĂ„Â§ataw il-Ktieb, u dawk li jemmnu, ma jkollhomx dubju, u biex dawk li fi qlubhom gĂ„Â§andhom marda, u dawk bla twemmin, jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Xi jrid jgĂ„Â§id Alla b'dan l-ezempju 7' Hekk Alla jtellef it-triq lil min irid, u juriha lil min irid. Ă„Â¦add ma jaf il-qawwiet ta' Sidek Ă„Â§liefu, u (din) ma hijiex gĂ„Â§ajr tifkira lill-bnedmin

33.translation: ufuq il-lejl meta jkun fi tmiemu

37.translation: gĂ„Â§al-min, minnkom, irid jimxi 'l quddiem, jew jibqa' lura

38.translation: Kull ruĂ„Â§ mizmuma b'rahan b'dak li kisbet (gĂ„Â§aliha nnifisha)

39.translation: Ă„Â§lief'nies il-lemin (il-gusti, li emmnu u gĂ„Â§amlu gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba)

40.translation: Huma jistaqsu lil xulxin f'Gonna (ta' l-GĂ„Â§eden)

43.translation: (Huma fil-Ă„Â§arjin) jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Ma konniex minn dawk li jitolbu

45.translation: Konnanghidu kliem fieragĂ„Â§ ma' dawk li jgĂ„Â§iduh

47.translation: sa ma gietna dik (il-mewt) li hi zgura

48.translation: Matiswilhomx l-intercessjoni ta' dawk li jintercedu

52.translation: Lel Kull bniedem minnhom irid. li jingĂ„Â§ata (inr AHMa) pagni miftuĂ„Â§a (u fihom jingĂ„Â§ad lilu biex jimxi wara MuĂ„Â§ammad)

53.translation: Lel Izda ma jibzgĂ„Â§ux mill-OĂ„Â§ra (mill-Ă„Â¦ajja l-OĂ„Â§ra)

54.translation: Lel TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dan (il-Qoran) huwa tifkira

56.translation: U ma jiftakrux Ă„Â§lief jekk Alla jkun irid. Huwa jistĂ„Â§oqq il-biza' u l-ubbidjenza (ta' dawk li jemmmu), u Huwa Sid il-maĂ„Â§fra

2.translation: tabilĂ„Â§aqq naĂ„Â§lef bir-ruĂ„Â§ li tlum (ilha nnifisha u tindem)

3.translation: Jaqaw il-bniedem (bla hemmin) jaĂ„Â§seb li m'aĂ„Â§niex se nigbru gĂ„Â§admu
